textPlain: Can someone share what's the potential ramification of this?
I thought only Samsung and LG are producing OLED panels right now? Prices are getting affordable, so IPS/VA is going to be more of a obsolete tech in a few years.

LCDs (IPS and VA) still represent over 70% of the global display market. Cars, refrigerators, toys, etc all still use LCD displays.OLED is still overwhelmingly Samsung and LG, but OLED demand only represents around 5-7% of total display demand.
